name: @vexa/dash-api-client
description: The api.v1 REST client behind a PORT: getMeetings/getMeeting/getTranscripts/getRecordingMaster/postBot/deleteBot. createHttpApiClient (injected fetchImpl, validates responses via @vexa/dash-contracts) + createFakeApiClient (in-memory api.v1 golden shapes). The dashboard talks to one ApiClient interface; HTTP vs fake is a swap.
